---
name: Feature Request
about: New chip, carrier profile, command, or capability
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Type

- [ ] New chipset / SoC
- [ ] New carrier band profile
- [ ] New CLI command
- [ ] New pipeline
- [ ] New vendor backend
- [ ] Documentation

## Description

What you want added and why.

## For New Chip Entries

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Chip name | e.g. MT6899 |
| Platform string | e.g. mt6899 |
| Architecture | e.g. arm64 |
| Year released | e.g. 2024 |
| Download mode | e.g. BROM via Vol- |
| Source / reference | Link |

## For Carrier Profiles

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Carrier name | e.g. Celcom Malaysia |
| Country | e.g. MY |
| LTE bands | e.g. B1, B3, B7, B28 |
| 5G NR bands | e.g. n78 |
| Primary LTE band | e.g. B3 |
| Source | Carrier spec link |

## Do You Have Hardware to Test?

- [ ] Yes — I can test on a real device
- [ ] No — requesting for device I don't own
